summary: This is a brief announcement post where Cathy O'Neil shares that she co-authored an op-ed in the Financial Times with Bart Schermer. The op-ed, titled 'Audit the algorithms that are ruling our lives,' argues for algorithmic accountability and transparency. The post itself contains minimal content beyond the link and acknowledgment that the article is behind a paywall.
key_points: O'Neil collaborated with Bart Schermer on a Financial Times op-ed
The op-ed calls for auditing algorithms that govern daily life
The full argument is inaccessible without a subscription
money_quotes: Audit the algorithms that are ruling our lives
key_insight: Algorithms increasingly control important aspects of our lives and need systematic auditing for accountability.
